mapper.select:
SELECT TYPE_ID, TYPE_NM, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM TICKET_TYPE WHERE 1=1
AND TYPE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND TYPE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, TYPE_ID ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TICKET_TYPE WHERE 1=1
AND TYPE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND TYPE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT TYPE_ID, TYPE_NM, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM TICKET_TYPE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, TYPE_ID ASC
